name: @toast-ui/editor
when_to_use: 当真源是 Markdown 但用户要 WYSIWYG 体验并能切回原文(文档/README/笔记)时用它;要产物为 Markdown 而非 HTML/Delta 时优于 quill,要实时格式化预览时优于纯 codemirror。
why_valuable: 双模 Markdown 编辑器(所见即所得与原始 Markdown 源实时同步)加 GFM 表格、任务列表、语法高亮代码块、滚动同步,是大量 parser + 编辑器接线,AI 无法在对话内可靠复刻。

en.when_to_use: Use it when Markdown is the source of truth but users need a WYSIWYG experience with the option to switch back to source (documents, READMEs, or notes); prefer it to quill when the output must be Markdown rather than HTML/Delta, and to plain codemirror when you need a live formatted preview.
en.why_valuable: A dual-mode Markdown editor that keeps WYSIWYG and raw Markdown synchronized and adds GFM tables, task lists, syntax-highlighted code blocks, and scroll synchronization requires extensive parser and editor wiring that AI cannot reliably reproduce in a conversation.

data_in.note: Use initialValue for initial content (a Markdown string); retrieve output with editor.getMarkdown() or editor.getHTML(). It is based on ProseMirror and depends on document.getSelection.

schema.initialValue?: string -- initial Markdown source, empty by default
schema.previewStyle?: 'tab' | 'vertical' -- default 'tab'; 'vertical' is a side-by-side live preview
schema.height?: string -- for example '400px' or 'auto'; do not use vh
schema.toolbarItems?: (string | object)[][] -- toolbar groups, with the full built-in set by default

spec.note: Pass height as a string such as '400px' (or 'auto' to follow content); do not use vh or percentage heights.

data_in.note: 初始内容用 initialValue(Markdown 字符串);产物用 editor.getMarkdown() 或 editor.getHTML()。基于 ProseMirror,依赖 document.getSelection。

schema.initialValue?: string —— 初始 Markdown 源,默认空
schema.previewStyle?: 'tab' | 'vertical' —— 默认 'tab';'vertical' 为并排实时预览
schema.toolbarItems?: (string | object)[][] —— 工具栏分组,默认内置全套

spec.note: height 传字符串如 '400px'(或 'auto' 随内容);禁 vh/百分比高。

uplink: Markdown/HTML 产物由消费 AI 调 getMarkdown()/getHTML() 取回;change 回调由其接原生,不预设统一契约。

carriers.widget: conditional:CSS 落 shadow;ProseMirror 选区跨 shadow 在部分浏览器失效,弹窗默认逃到 body
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm exports {default=Editor, Editor, EditorCore};new Editor(options:EditorOptions) 已验证(types/editor.d.ts:162/199/292);EditorOptions.el(必填)/height/initialValue/previewStyle('tab'|'vertical')/initialEditType('markdown'|'wysiwyg')/toolbarItems 均真;getMarkdown()/getHTML() 已验证(233/235)。globalStyleInjection=no:主题 CSS 为外链 dist/toastui-editor.css(200),document.head 写入计数 0。globalEvents=no:0 document.addEventListener / 0 window.addEventListener(22 个监听器均绑在编辑器自有节点)。globalDomMutation=yes:弹窗 append 到 document.body(×2)。shadowCompatible=conditional:基于 ProseMirror,依赖 document.getSelection(×9)——与 contenteditable 同样的跨 shadow 选区隐患;弹窗亦逃到 body。

minimal.initialValue:
# 🍞 Toast UI Editor

A **Markdown** editor with live **preview** and WYSIWYG.

## Task list

- [x] Write the docs
- [x] Add GFM tables
- [ ] Ship it 🚀

## Comparison

| Editor   | Output   | Live preview |
| -------- | -------- | ------------ |
| Toast UI | Markdown | yes          |
| Quill    | Delta    | no           |

```js
const greet = (name) => `Hello, ${name}!`;
console.log(greet('world'));
```

> Tip: toggle between Markdown and WYSIWYG anytime.
